notes: xmldocument normalizes bounded well-formed XML document text
xmldocument(expr) routes to the canonical XML document helper
xmlnamespaces emits a deterministic namespace declaration fragment
xmlnamespaces declaration-list route supports default namespace descriptor output
xmlparse validates and returns bounded XML document text
xmlparse document/content signature routes with bounded whitespace-mode metadata
xmlquery supports exact root-name path lookup
xmlquery signature route supports narrow descendant tag lookup
xmlserialize returns character text for XML values
xmlserialize document/content/sequence signature routes with target type metadata
xmltext escapes text into a safe XML text fragment
xmltext(text) routes to the canonical XML text escape helper
xmlvalidate returns the validated XML document
xmlvalidate document/content/sequence signature routes to bounded XML validation
xml alias routes to bounded XML document normalization
xml.attrs emits deterministic safe attribute descriptors
xml.ns emits deterministic safe namespace descriptors
